title: The Godot powered Slay the Spire 2 has already hit over 3 million sales
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 developers Mega Crit are sitting on a pile of gold now, as they've confirmed that the game has sold ridiculously well.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/03/the-godot-powered-slay-the-spire-2-has-already-hit-over-3-million-sales/
